seo.title: Election State Machine | Tamper-Proof Secure Voting System
seo.description: Learn how our election state machine ensures tamper-proof, verifiable, and auditable elections. 5-phase lifecycle with immutable audit trail.
seo.keywords: election state machine, secure voting, tamper-proof elections, verifiable voting, audit trail
seo.og_title: Election State Machine - Secure Voting Architecture
seo.og_description: Production-grade election state machine with immutable audit logs and cryptographic verification.

hero.title: Tamper-Proof Election State Machine
hero.subtitle: Verifiable, auditable, and secure elections from setup to results

phases.title: 5-Phase Election Lifecycle
phases.subtitle: A structured, transparent process from setup to results

administration.title: Administration
administration.description: Set up election parameters, define positions, configure voting rules, and prepare the system for nominations.

nomination.title: Nomination
nomination.description: Candidates nominate themselves or are nominated. Committee reviews and validates all candidacies before voting begins.

voting.title: Voting
voting.description: Voters cast their votes anonymously. Once this phase starts, dates and rules are locked to prevent tampering.

counting.title: Counting
counting.description: Automatic vote count and result calculation. Every vote is cryptographically verified and auditable.

results.title: Results
results.description: Results published and final. Complete audit trail available for verification and dispute resolution.

security_features.title: Immutable Audit Trail
security_features.description: Every state change, vote cast, and system action is permanently recorded and cannot be modified or deleted. Perfect for compliance and dispute resolution.

security_features.title: Cryptographic Verification
security_features.description: Each vote is cryptographically hashed and verifiable by voters. Tampering is mathematically detectable.

security_features.title: Voting Phase Lock
security_features.description: Once voting starts, dates and rules cannot be changed. Prevents late-minute manipulation or confusion.

security_features.title: Complete Anonymity
security_features.description: Voter identity is completely separated from their vote. No way to link individual voters to their selections.

security_features.title: Grace Periods
security_features.description: Configurable grace periods between phases allow orderly transitions and prevent surprises.

security_features.title: Transparent Architecture
security_features.description: Fully auditable system design means anyone can verify election integrity.

benefits_admin.title: For Election Administrators
items: Easy setup with guided election configuration
Phase completion tracking with progress indicators
Complete audit logs for every action

benefits_voter.title: For Voters
items: Anonymous voting - your identity is never linked to your vote
Receipt-based verification - confirm your vote was recorded correctly
Tamper-proof results - mathematical proof of integrity
24/7 access - vote from anywhere, anytime during voting period

faq.question: How is voter anonymity ensured?
faq.answer: Voter identity is completely separated from vote data at the database level. There are no user_id columns in votes tables, making it mathematically impossible to link voters to their selections.

faq.question: Can votes be tampered with?
faq.answer: No. Every vote is cryptographically hashed and recorded in an immutable audit log. Any tampering is immediately detectable through cryptographic verification.

faq.question: What happens if someone votes twice?
faq.answer: The system prevents duplicate voting through unique voting codes. Each voter receives unique codes and can only vote once per election.

faq.question: Can voting rules be changed during voting?
faq.answer: No. Once the voting phase starts, all dates and rules are locked. This prevents last-minute manipulation or confusion.

faq.question: How is dispute resolution handled?
faq.answer: Complete audit logs make it possible to investigate any disputes. System administrators can trace every action without compromising voter anonymity.

faq.question: Is the system compliant with election regulations?
faq.answer: Yes. The immutable audit trail and transparency are specifically designed for regulatory compliance and can meet international election standards.
